falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 breaks above 5,000 with volume exceeding 2.5 billion shares in a single day
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A clear breakout above key resistance with surge in volume would invalidate the consolidation/HOLD signal by indicating a strong upward trend

falsification_conditions.condition: Blowoff score increases to 60+ within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score exceeding 60 would contradict the current HOLD verdict by indicating a blowoff top scenario rather than consolidation

falsification_conditions.condition: Pattern match percentage drops below 60% for bottom_2024_aug pattern
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A significant decline in pattern similarity would invalidate the current pattern-based analysis by showing the market is following a different trajectory

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
